name: Top cross-platform complaint clusters
finding: Recurring pain points: pricing clarity, telehealth reliability, billing complexity, support speed.
complaint: Users struggle with hidden add-on costs and manual operational workflows.
opportunity: Build transparent pricing calculator + guided claims/status workspace.

name: Fast opportunities map
finding: High-leverage wins map cleanly to booking/session/follow-up vertical.
complaint: Workflow fragmentation and poor continuity between booking and care delivery.
opportunity: Complete booking -> session -> follow-up with fallback-safe virtual sessions.

name: Virtual sessions integration planning
finding: Provider-agnostic abstraction reduces lock-in and improves resilience.
complaint: Session failures and poor backup logic disrupt care.
opportunity: Zoom primary + Jitsi/backup + phone fallback path.

name: Resource license gating
finding: Many wellness assets are unverified for commercial clinical use.
complaint: Teams risk using unlicensed content in production.
opportunity: License verification registry and release gating by status.
